name: 比较研究
subject: english
domain_name: 互文与跨文本 / Intertextuality / Intertextuality
curriculum_points: Students will be able to construct a focused, insightful comparison of two or more texts, moving beyond superficial similarities/differences to explore deeper connections in theme, technique, or context.
Students will be able to use comparison as a critical tool to illuminate the distinctive features and broader significance of each text in the pair or group.
